data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tier-based perk visibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm this behavior. The linked use case mentions the need for tier-based visibility, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify tier-based perk visibility.
